← Sounds

Sounds · Book One

Opening in: English · فارسی · Dansk · isiZulu · + more

Ukuvula

Lapha, akwenzeki lutho. Akukho okulungiswayo, akukho okubhidlizwayo. Akukho kuhlaziya okuzayo. Akukho siphetho. Le ncwadi iyisiphetho esixegayo somucu wamazwi ake aba ngamaphimbo. Amaphimbo ake azulazula lapha nalaphaya emhlabeni, ekhoneni elithile lendawo ethile, noma mhlawumbe ekhoneni nje lomcabango womuntu. Manje, njengoba le migqa idlula phambi kwamehlo akho, lawo maphimbo sekuyisikhathi adlula, futhi imikhondo yawo engokoqobo isisele ekhasini. Konke sekuthule: amaphimbo, futhi mhlawumbe nalowo mhlaba nabantu bawo. Kungenzeka ngisho nengqondo eyake yaguqula lawo maphimbo aba amazwi asekhasini kudala yaphela ukuphefumula. Njengalo mzuzwana — odlule ngesikhathi ufunda lo musho — yonke imizuzwana yale ncwadi isidlulile. Imizuzwana nezithombe ezazingalahleka emsindweni wezinguquko zomhlaba ukube azibhalwanga lapha. Zabhalwa ukuze zibe yibhuloho phakathi komhlaba wami nowakho: lisuka emhlabeni wami ngesikhathi ngibhala le misho, liye emhlabeni wakho ngesikhathi uhlala phansi uyifunda. Kwelami icala ngiqaqa umucu wamazwi; kwelakho uyawubutha. Njengasebuntwaneni, lapho uMaman eqaqa intambo ezingutsheni ezindala, thina zingane sibambe omunye umkhawulo sihambe ngaphakathi endlini ukuze ingaphithani. Mhlawumbe isizukulwane sakho safika sekwedlule iminyaka embalwa lowo mhlaba wentambo, kodwa ake ucabange: kudala, kwenye indawo emhlabeni, izingane zazidlala kanjalo. Manje ngiqaqa umucu wamazwi, wena uwuthathe uye emhlabeni wakho, ukuze ungaphithani lapha, emhlabeni wami.

Incwadi iqala lapha. Uhlelo olugcwele lwesiZulu lusendleleni; kuze kube yileso sikhathi, yonke incwadi ingafundwa mahhala: ngesiPheresiya, isiNgisi nesiDanish.
